summary: POS Screen (iPOS 5 UX style) frontend testing completed. All core features verified working: search by product name with dropdown, add to cart, qty +/- buttons, real-time total calculation, customer selection, BAYAR TUNAI (F1) and TRANSFER (F2) payment modals, quick amount buttons, kembalian calculation, and successful transaction creation via POST /api/sales/invoices with invoice number returned.

issues: Console warning: In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <option> - hydration issue in customer select dropdown

critical_code_review_comments: Line 633 POSScreen.jsx: Customer select option rendering may cause hydration warning due to <span> inside <option>. Consider simplifying the option content to avoid React hydration mismatch.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing product 'Charger Fast 20W USB-C' (PRD-AUDIT-001, Rp 45,000) and customer 'CUS000001 - AUDIT-Counter Pulsa Makmur'
context_for_next_testing_agent: POS Screen fully functional. Invoice INV-20260319-0011 was created during testing. All keyboard shortcuts (F1=Cash, F2=Transfer, Esc=Cancel/Close) work correctly. Customer must be selected before payment can proceed.

features_tested.search_by_product_name_shows_dropdown_re: PASS - 'charger' search returns 2 results: Charger Fast 20W USB-C and Charger Fast 33W Dual Port
features_tested.clicking_search_result_adds_item_to_cart: PASS - via Enter key and click
features_tested.cart_displays_item_name_price_qty_subtot: PASS - shows product name, code, price (Rp 45,000), qty (2), subtotal (Rp 90,000)
features_tested.qty_plus_minus_buttons_work_correctly: PASS - qty increased from 1 to 2, total updated from Rp 45,000 to Rp 90,000
features_tested.customer_selection_dropdown_works: PASS - selected CUS000001 - AUDIT-Counter Pulsa Makmur
features_tested.quick_amount_buttons_in_payment_modal_wo: PASS - Rp 90,000, Rp 100,000, Rp 200,000, Rp 500,000 buttons visible
features_tested.success_toast_shows_invoice_number_after: PASS - Toast: Transaksi Berhasil! INV-20260319-0011 Kembalian: Rp 5.000
